HeroText.title: Hi, I'm Criss
HeroText.headingBottom1: in Technical Support and Web Development creating
HeroText.pitch: I am passionate about solving problems and creating user-centered digital experiences, backed by a solid and reliable technological infrastructure.

About.title: About Me
About.grid1_sub: I am a Systems Engineer with experience in technical support and a strong motivation to grow as a web developer. My career path has allowed me to understand technology from different perspectives: from end-user support and incident resolution to the design, development, and deployment of modern web applications. I enjoy continuous learning, taking on new challenges, and creating solutions that generate a positive impact.
About.grid3_sub: Available to collaborate remotely or on-site. I adapt quickly to new environments and enjoy working as part of a team to achieve common goals.
About.grid4_cta: Looking for someone committed to driving your next project forward?
About.grid5_sub: I work with technologies focused on modern web development, integrating frontend, backend, and deployment tools to build functional and scalable solutions while continuing to expand my knowledge.

quizly-platform.title: Online Quiz and Assessment Platform
quizly-platform.description: Full-Stack platform for creating and taking interactive quizzes, featuring real-time statistics, progress protection, and a dynamic assessment builder.
subDescription: I developed the frontend with React, implementing a responsive navigation panel and a smooth progress bar for the user.
I built the backend with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB for structured question management and score storage.
I optimally deployed the complete solution using Vercel for the client and Render for the database and API.

puzzle-deslizante.title: Interactive Sliding Puzzle
puzzle-deslizante.description: Interactive web game where users solve a classic puzzle and compete directly on a leaderboard.
subDescription: I developed the entire mathematical logic of the game on the client side using React, achieving fluid movements and interactions.
I designed and integrated a REST API with Node.js and Express to process user performance and update the ranking in real time.

verbox.title: VerBoX - Interactive Word Game
verbox.description: Web application inspired by Wordle, featuring custom mechanics and adjustable difficulty levels based on word length.
subDescription: I implemented a functional virtual keyboard and native JavaScript logic for attempt validation using a custom dictionary.
I designed an attractive interface with a Liquid Glass aesthetic, sound effects, and high-impact animations using fluid CSS.
Published and optimized in production through Vercel, guaranteeing a responsive performance on any mobile device.

memory-master.title: Memory Master - Interactive Memory Matching Game
memory-master.description: I developed Memory Master, a modern and interactive memory matching game where players challenge their memory by finding matching card pairs in the shortest time and with the fewest moves possible.
subDescription: I built the application using Next.js 15, React, and TypeScript, creating a modern, scalable architecture with strong type safety.
I designed a fully responsive interface with Tailwind CSS and implemented smooth animations using Framer Motion to enhance the user experience.
I implemented the game logic, scoring system, and data persistence using LocalStorage to save high scores and user preferences.
I optimized the experience with a Mobile-First approach, Dark Mode support, Glassmorphism design, and a premium interface inspired by modern SaaS applications.

pacifica.title: Technical Support Assistant
contents: I provided on-site and remote technical support to end users to ensure the operational continuity of computer equipment.
I configured and provisioned Polycom and Yealink IP phones through MCM linking.
I managed and continuously monitored technical support tickets, ensuring minimal response times.

elnumerouno.title: Systems and Administrative Assistant
contents: I participated in testing and improving internal technological tools to optimize operational processes.
I managed and updated information within the company's systems, ensuring data integrity and availability.
I prepared reports for information tracking and analysis, supporting decision-making.
I collaborated in the control and management of databases to ensure efficient and reliable information handling.

grupoomer.title: Technical Support
contents: I provided technical support to users, addressing and resolving hardware and software-related incidents.
I performed preventive and corrective maintenance on computer equipment to ensure proper operation and extend its useful life.
I collaborated in improving the company's intranet, supporting the implementation of adjustments and optimizations to enhance the experience and functionality of the internal platform.

curiosidad.name: Curiosity
curiosidad.body: I am motivated to understand how things work and find ways to improve them.

evolucion.name: Evolution
evolucion.body: I am making the leap from technical support to web development, combining both experiences.

aprendizaje.name: Continuous Learning
aprendizaje.body: I am always exploring new technologies and improving my skills to stay up to date.

resolucion.name: Problem Solving
resolucion.body: I enjoy analyzing complex situations and finding practical and efficient solutions.

adaptabilidad.name: Adaptability
adaptabilidad.body: I adapt quickly to new environments, tools, and technological challenges.

equipo.name: Teamwork
equipo.body: I believe in communication, collaboration, and mutual support to achieve better results.

constancia.name: Consistency and Dedication
constancia.body: I believe that professional growth is built through learning every single day.

tecnologia.name: Passion for Technology
tecnologia.body: I enjoy solving problems and turning ideas into useful solutions.

Contact.title: Let's Talk
Contact.intro: Are you interested in learning more about my experience, my projects, or exploring a collaboration opportunity? I'll be glad to chat with you.

message.label: Message
message.placeholder: Tell me about the opportunity or your inquiry...
